title: Interviews on Early Childhood Education and Care Arrangements during COVID-19: Parents of Children under School Age 2020-2021
description: The data consists of information collected from parents of five- and six-year-old children on their childcare arrangements and their family's daily life during the COVID-19 pandemic. The data is part of the multidisciplinary project "Finnish Childcare Policies: In/Equality in Focus" (CHILDCARE), carried out by the University of Jyväskylä, Tampere University and the Finnish Institute for Health and Welfare (THL). In the interviews, questions were initially asked about the child's and family's eve
